query: double exposure ghostly silhouette overlapping portrait
message: sub:double_exposure — anti_aesthetic — overlapping ghostly portraits, doubled silhouettes, layered composites

response.objective_caption: A sepia-toned photograph showing three instances of the same person positioned against a brick wall at night. One figure stands on the left facing slightly upward, another stands on the right holding an object near the wall, and a third crouches at the bottom right with hands clasped near the face. All three wear tank tops and pants. The brick wall runs diagonally from upper left to lower right, and grass is visible at the bottom of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A sepia-toned, faded photograph with surreal double exposure effects showing three ghostly overlapping instances of the same person against a brick wall at night. The muted, desaturated palette and harsh flash lighting create deep shadows and an oppressive atmosphere. One translucent figure stands on the left facing upward with an unsettling expression, another stands on the right partially merged with the bricks, and a third crouches at the bottom right with hands clasped near the face in a gesture of distress. The composition is tilted and cropped awkwardly at the edges, with unconventional framing that enhances the dreamlike, emotionally disturbing quality of the multiplied, fragmented self-portrait.
